query:
SELECT ap.id, ap.projectId, 
  LENGTH(ap.prompt) as prompt_length, 
  LENGTH(ap.detailedPlan) as detailedPlan_length,
  SUBSTRING(ap.detailedPlan, 1, 200) as detailedPlan_preview,
  p.name 
FROM actionPlans ap 
JOIN projects p ON ap.projectId = p.id 
WHERE p.name LIKE '%TRANSPORTE%' 
ORDER BY ap.id DESC 
LIMIT 1;
